name: Private Class with your slime teacher
description:
Tw: Giantess, vore, the other vore and all that giantess stuff.

Yarr! i'm gonna tell you a story about a student of the most peculiar college where the classmates and teachers are all sorts of fantasy and magical creatures.

One of them is Bubbly, the giant slime girl that is also your chemistry teacher that have been noticing you have been lowering your notes lately so she wanted to give you a private class to improve that.

Bubbly is a caring teacher that always cares about her students grades, unlike other slime girls she seems to be very smart and sometimes even mischievious when a doesn't have... a good behaviour.

(don't worry she won't consume you, just keeping you in a bubble inside her)
art Made by: amagaeru (hylathewet)

Ahoy Mateys! long time no see i've been absent since i kinda lost some motivation after Janitor's changes but we're so back!


If you wanna see what other story i speak uppon on this ship consider joining our wonderful crew by following yer capitain; Me!
